description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a rooftop terrace equipped with a circular pool and outdoor seating. The exterior walls are primarily light pink with black and white accents, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The property includes a spacious driveway with multiple parked cars, a detached garage, and a fenced perimeter. The landscaping features a manicured lawn, shrubs, and several mature trees, as well as a small outbuilding and water tank. The main entryway is accessible from the driveway and is marked by a simple, functional design without elaborate ornamentation. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban residence with ample outdoor amenities and parking.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace and pool, large driveway, detached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and outbuildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, rooftop terrace with pool, driveway, garage, and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked cars, water tank, and the rear of the house with visible rooftop features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, trees, small outbuilding, and the full extent of the flat roof and terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rooftop pool, terrace, and the arrangement of trees and outbuildings along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entryway with a standard door, no porch, minimal steps, and no decorative columns or overhangs
